item.text: I’ll execute the turn from the supplied briefing only: play Zap for immediate damage/tempo, convert the likely buy into a damage card if available, then push units toward the nearest center pressure points.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -euo pipefail

cat > .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/actions/turn-001.deck.json <<'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-001\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":4},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"inferno\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON

bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/deck.json --actions .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/actions/turn-001.deck.json --result .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.deck.result.json

cat > .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/actions/turn-001.board.json <<'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-001\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-start-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":1}},{\"unit\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":11,\"row\":0},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":2}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-start-3\",\"from\":{\"col\":12,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}},{\"unit\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":11,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":9,\"row\":2}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON

bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/board.json --deck-result .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.deck.result.json --actions .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/actions/turn-001.board.json --result .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.board.result.json

bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke --deck-result .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.deck.result.json --board-result .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.board.result.json --summary \"P1 played Zap, bought Inferno, and advanced all units toward center pressure.\" --reasoning \"Rush plan: keep tempo by playing Zap, buy the highest immediate damage card available, occupy the nearest center and push the rest of the formation forward for early contesting.\" --strict-win

bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/timeline.json

printf '\\nDECK RESULT\\n'
node -e 'const r=require(\"./.games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.deck.result.json\"); console.log(JSON.stringify({ok:r.ok, line:r.line, active:r.active, events:r.events}, null, 2))'
printf '\\nBOARD RESULT\\n'
node -e 'const r=require(\"./.games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.board.result.json\"); console.log(JSON.stringify({ok:r.ok, line:r.line, supply:r.supply, supplyControl:r.supplyControl, events:r.events}, null, 2))'
printf '\\nRATIONALE\\nRush: played Zap for damage tempo, bought Inferno for maximum near-term damage, occupied center-northeast and advanced the formation toward center contests.\\n'"

/bin/zsh -lc "set -euo pipefail

cat > .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/actions/turn-001.deck.json <<'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-001\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":4},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"inferno\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON

bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/deck.json --actions .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/actions/turn-001.deck.json --result .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.deck.result.json

cat > .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/actions/turn-001.board.json <<'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-001\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-start-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":1}},{\"unit\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":11,\"row\":0},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":2}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-start-3\",\"from\":{\"col\":12,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}},{\"unit\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":11,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":9,\"row\":2}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON

bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/board.json --deck-result .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.deck.result.json --actions .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/actions/turn-001.board.json --result .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.board.result.json

bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke --deck-result .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.deck.result.json --board-result .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.board.result.json --summary \"P1 played Zap, bought Inferno, and advanced all units toward center pressure.\" --reasoning \"Rush plan: keep tempo by playing Zap, buy the highest immediate damage card available, occupy the nearest center and push the rest of the formation forward for early contesting.\" --strict-win

bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win .games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/timeline.json

printf '\\nDECK RESULT\\n'
node -e 'const r=require(\"./.games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.deck.result.json\"); console.log(JSON.stringify({ok:r.ok, line:r.line, active:r.active, events:r.events}, null, 2))'
printf '\\nBOARD RESULT\\n'
node -e 'const r=require(\"./.games/e024-codex-one-turn-smoke/results/turn-001.board.result.json\"); console.log(JSON.stringify({ok:r.ok, line:r.line, supply:r.supply, supplyControl:r.supplyControl, events:r.events}, null, 2))'
printf '\\nRATIONALE\\nRush: played Zap for damage tempo, bought Inferno for maximum near-term damage, occupied center-northeast and advanced the formation toward center contests.\\n'"

item.text:
Completed and validated `turn-001`.

Deck line: played `zap`, moved to buy, bought `inferno`, ended turn.

Board line: moved all P1 units forward, with `P1-raider-start-1` taking `center-northeast` at `{8,1}` and the rest advancing toward center pressure.

Rationale: rush tempo: convert Zap into immediate damage, buy the highest near-term damage card available, and contest the nearest center while moving the formation aggressively forward.
